creator: bmc@WillsCreek.COM
text:
Enclosed is an update to the `gnuls' port, to bring it up to date
	with the latest version (4.0) of the GNU fileutils software, on
	which the port is based.

Fix: Enclosed is the result of a "diff -uNr gnuls-3.16 gnuls". Apply
	this recursive patch to bring the port up-to-date. I've also
	enclosed a uuencoded copy of the new port's tarball, in case it's
	easier to update that way.
